shortDescription: German Embassy · National D visa · Admission + blocked account · APS for India

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current national visa fee (€75 approx) and blocked account amount (€11,904 for 2026) on auswaertiges-amt.de and deutsche-bank.de before quoting.

alert.title: APS certificate for India
alert.body: Indian students generally need APS certificate before visa appointment. Verify current APS processing time before promising intake dates.

about.label: Description
about.value: National visa (Type D) for study at a recognised German university or preparatory course. After entry, convert to residence permit at local Ausländerbehörde.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: University admission (Zulassung) or conditional admission · Blocked account or scholarship · APS certificate (India) · Health insurance · Motivation letter

about.label: Blocked account
about.value: €11,904 for 2026 (12 × €992/month) typically required unless scholarship or sponsor alternative applies.

about.label: Key authority
about.value: German Embassy/Consulate in India · Federal Foreign Office · Local Ausländerbehörde after arrival

about.label: After approval
about.value: Enter Germany; register address; apply for residence permit at Ausländerbehörde within visa validity.

redFlagsBanner: After refusal, address embassy feedback before rebooking—blocked account and APS cannot be rushed last minute.

redFlags.title: APS not completed
redFlags.description: Visa appointment booked without APS certificate.
redFlags.fix: Complete APS before embassy slot; track processing on APS website

redFlags.title: Insufficient blocked account
redFlags.description: Amount below required monthly sum or not from recognised provider.
redFlags.fix: Open blocked account at approved bank for full required amount

redFlags.title: Admission not from recognised institution
redFlags.description: Private unrecognised college or expired Zulassung.

redFlags.title: Weak motivation letter
redFlags.description: Generic letter not explaining study plan and Germany choice.
redFlags.fix: Course-specific motivation linking prior study to German program

redFlags.title: Language proof missing
redFlags.description: Program requires German/English certificate not provided.

faqs.q: Can we guarantee student visa approval?
faqs.a: No. Embassy decides based on admission, funds, and credibility. Never promise approval.
Academic Evaluation Centre verification for Indian academic documents—mandatory for most Indian student visa applicants.
Typically €11,904 (12 months × €992). Verify current amount before opening account.
Dependants may apply separately; prove additional funds and accommodation. Assess case-by-case.
Depends on program—follow admission and embassy requirements.

faqs.q: How long to convert to residence permit?
faqs.a: Apply at Ausländerbehörde soon after arrival and registration.

faqs.q: Can I work on student visa?
faqs.a: Limited working hours permitted—verify current rules for students in Germany.
Discuss 18-month job-seeker residence permit or Opportunity Card separately.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
Blocked account funds belong to client—never commingle with firm accounts
proTips: Start APS 3–4 months before intended intake
Open blocked account only after admission confirmed
Book embassy slot when file 90% ready
Motivation letter must match admission course
Verify health insurance accepted by embassy
postApproval: Guide on Ausländerbehörde appointment after arrival
Remind blocked account monthly withdrawal rules

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial Germany student visa counselor content with 2026 blocked account amount.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: APS backlog is real—do not promise winter intake without APS timeline confirmation.

resources.title: Make it in Germany — Student visa

quiz.question: After arrival student must:
options: Register address and apply residence permit

dos: Open blocked account for full required amount
donts: Do not book embassy without APS
Do not quote outdated blocked account amount
mistakes: APS applied too late for intake

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample university admission letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: German Hochschule Zulassung for national visa.

sampleDocs.title: Sample APS certificate (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Academic Evaluation Centre certificate for India.
